caption: A man with distinctive silver-blonde spiked hair and glasses is seated in a studio, wearing a white button-down shirt, beige suspenders, and a small red bowtie. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, a woman with pink hair in a green top is visible behind a display that features the text "UNIQUE FASHION". A framed piece of art with a yellow shield emblem hangs on the wall. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "#STALBO PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "B.E.S TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expression, while the rest of the scene remains static.
